name: tiger-skills
description: Code-quality (inner loop) and harness-engineering (outer loop) skills that work as one system. code-quality enforces 13 design principles + Python/Rust rules. harness-engineering manages the full agent workflow from session discipline through verification. Each skill cross-references the other at defined handoff points.
author: arkadaz

skills.name: code-quality
skills.description: Inner loop — enforces 13 design principles (SRP, OCP, LSP, DRY), language-specific rules for Python and Rust, independent review agent, typed boundaries, structured logging, enums over magic strings, and no-water code. Cross-references harness-engineering for verification pipeline.

skills.name: harness-engineering
skills.description: Outer loop — session discipline (clock-in/out), spec-before-code, WIP=1, three-layer verification pipeline, parallel agent dispatch, AGENTS.md as router, PROGRESS.md + DECISIONS.md, GRAPH.md code flow, diagnostic loop, and Git discipline. Cross-references code-quality at implementation steps.
